name: Goblin Goodies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease baking sheets with shortening. Place sheets of foil on a countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine shortening and brown sugar. Beat until well blended. Add egg, milk, and vanilla; beat again until smooth.
3. Stir in orange rind and extract. Mix in oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon with the creamed mixture until just combined.
4. Fold in raisins, nuts, and chocolate candies.
5. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough about 3 inches (7 cm) apart onto prepared baking sheets.
6. Bake one sheet at a time for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned. Allow cookies to cool on the sheet for 2 minutes before transferring them to foil to cool completely.
Makes: About 2-1/2 dozen cookies
